chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 1967 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1) For Order on Misc. No. 9732/2025 (U/A) 2) For Order on Misc. No. 9733/2025 (Exemption/A) 3) For Order on Misc. No. 9734/2025 (Stay/App) 4) For hearing of main case. -------------- 15.05.2025. Mr. Mushtaq Hussain Qazi, Advocate for Petitioner. ------------------------ 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Counsel requests for withdrawal of this petition with permission to file a fresh petition along with some orders passed by the forums below. Since notice has not been ordered, therefore, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn with pending application(s); however, the Petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh petition, which will be dealt with in accordance with law. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
